message:
🐛 Fix stat block overflow with auto-scaling number formatting (#1116)

Large values (7120 CPUs, 3536 pods) overflow stat block containers.
Add auto-scaling: 10K+ → "7.1K", 1M+ → "1.2M". Memory values
scale through MB → GB → TB → PB.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
